# Buildwise Media

> AI-powered marketing agency for service businesses.

## About
Buildwise Media builds AI-powered Revenue Engines for service businesses. We handle strategy, website, content production, paid ads, AI business tools, and analytics — so business owners can focus on running their business, not their marketing.

## Services

### Ascend — Full-Service AI Marketing
Done-for-you marketing engine. Website, content, ads, AI tools, strategy, analytics.
Price: $5,999/month. Month-to-month. No long-term contracts.
Engine Build fee at signing. Ad spend separate.

### Ascend Lite — Lead Generation Foundation
Sales funnel, paid ads management, strategy, analytics, brand foundation.
Price: $3,500/month. Month-to-month. No long-term contracts.

## Location
Alpharetta, Georgia
Serves clients nationwide (United States)
